content.body: Just to double-check, in the ETSI portal there are currently two meetings booked for today (3-4pm & 4-6pm drafting work), plus another one tomorrow (4-5pm). Are these all accurate?
huh, there is not supposed to be a meeting 3-4 PM today, only the 4-6 PM one
Let's use this pad for the latter one: https://pad.softwarefreedom.net/code/#/2/code/edit/AWA7Oa33JxHMb8HPDa5bwUvc/
I'll try to get the earlier one cancelled and send a clarification email
any concerns with moving the new draft to the original location: https://forge.etsi.org/rep/cyber/stan4cr2/en-304-617/-/merge_requests/38
